title: The Little Things
description: Just a big mod that makes the little things more noticable :)
body:
This mod is sort of a tribute to how far Minecraft has come in 15 years. Most of the mods change gameplay on the client, but some might require server-side functionality to work. I didn't add any shaders to this modpack, however, I found that Complementery works best with it. You can also try BSL, however, the look contradicts the gameplay. **Another thing is that you can add Physics Mod Pro via Haubna's Patreon. I couldn't add it as it was copyrighted content and could not be included in this modpack, but feel free to check out his patreon and download it for yourself!**

*Pssst... If you want to edit the mod, please feel free, however, if publishing that mod, please do give me a shout out! ^^*
